name: Yucun Hou
subtitle: Ph.D. Student
affiliation: Beijing Normal University; Imaging Physics Lab
Research Focus: My research focuses on quantitative PET imaging, physics-guided image reconstruction, and deep learning for medical image restoration. I am particularly interested in low-dose PET imaging, deep learning-based reconstruction, generative modeling for PET data augmentation, and data-driven correction methods for quantitative PET imaging. I am also involved in preclinical PET system development, including mechanical design, system assembly, and performance evaluation.

publications.citation: [2025/09] Hou Y, Zhan F, Liu J, et al. Cycle-constrained adversarial denoising convolutional network for PET image denoising: Multi-dimensional validation on large datasets with reader study and real low-dose data[J]. Medical Image Analysis, 2025: 103826.
[2025/12] Yuan Z, Zhan F, Lu H, Hou Y, et al. GPU-based list-mode TOF PET image reconstruction with complete correction techniques[J]. Medical Physics, 2026, 53(1): e70216.
